round: first verification after initial revision ledger

findings.issue: The deletion request still used cancellation wording in its critical confirmation obligation.
Person-identification and political-inference safeguards were declared critical but omitted from criticalObligationIds.
The critical tool obligation still referred to text edits after the request became reorder-only.
Too many artifact requests echoed policy wording instead of expressing triggers as natural user work.
Private-conference-URL metadata remained after the request explicitly removed the URL.
Preserving the rest of a recurring series was declared critical but omitted from criticalObligationIds despite being post-tool diagnostic in the one-turn harness.
One validator combined event-title nondisclosure with sensitive-inference avoidance but could observe only the latter.

resolution: All findings were addressed in eval/authoring/held-out-v3/revisions.jq before the dataset freeze. The three final verification files record pass=true with zero remaining findings.
